items.title: Motherwell and Wishaw Burgh Extension, &c. Order Confirmation Act 1964
Cheshire Brine Pumping (Compensation for Subsidence) Act 1964
Newcastle-under-Lyme Corporation Act 1964
Stafford Corporation Act 1964
St. John's Church, Smith Square Act 1964
Barry Corporation Act 1964
Elim Church Moor Lane Bolton Burial Ground Act 1964
British Railways Act 1964
Tees Conservancy Act 1964
Preston Corporation Act 1964
Shell Company of Australia Act 1964
Port of London (Extension of Seaward Limit) Act 1964
Norfolk Estuary Act 1964
St. Paul, Portman Square St. Marylebone Act 1964
Worcester Corporation Act 1964
National Provident Institution Act 1964
St. Dionis Backchurch Churchyard (Amendment) Act 1964
Isle of Wight River and Water Authority Act 1964
London Transport Act 1964
London County Council (Money) Act 1964
London County Council (General Powers) Act 1964
Pier and Harbour Order (King's Lynn Conservancy) Confirmation Act 1964
Customs Annuity and Benevolent Fund Act 1964
Pier and Harbour Order (Bideford Harbour) Order Confirmation Act 1964
Ministry of Housing and Local Government Provisional Order Confirmation (Shoreham and Lancing) Act 1964
Mersey River Board Act 1964
Bedford Corporation Act 1964
Cumberland County Council Act 1964
Newcastle-upon-Tyne Corporation Act 1964
Port of London Act 1964
St. George Hanover Square Burial Ground Act 1964
British Transport Docks Act 1964
West Riding County Council (General Powers) Act 1964
City of London (Courts) Act 1964
Wentworth Estate Act 1964
Edinburgh Corporation Order Confirmation Act 1964
Clyde Navigation Order Confirmation Act 1964
Glasgow Corporation Consolidation (Water, Transport and Markets) Order Confirmation Act 1964
Macduff Harbour Order Confirmation Act 1964
Chichester Rural District Act 1964
Life Association of Scotland Limited Act 1964
Chapel Street Congregational Church (Southport) Burial Ground Act 1964
Harwich Harbour Act 1964
Consolidated Fund Act 1964
Family Allowances and National Insurance Act 1964
Navy, Army and Air Force Reserves Act 1964
Episcopal Church (Scotland) Act 1964
items.description: An Act to remove a disability restricting the Clergy of the Episcopal Church in Scotland in the exercise of their office in England.

items.title: International Development Association Act 1964
Plant Varieties and Seeds Act 1964
items.description: An Act to provide for the granting of proprietary rights to persons who breed or discover plant varieties and for the issue of compulsory licences in respect thereof; to establish a tribunal to hear appeals and other proceedings relating to the rights, and to exclude certain agreements relating to the rights from Part I of the Restrictive Trade Practices Act 1956; to confer power to regulate, and to amend in other respects the law relating to, transactions in seeds and seed potatoes, including provision for the testing of seeds and seed potatoes, the establishment of an index of names of varieties and the imposition of restrictions as respects the introduction of new varieties; to control the import of seeds and seed potatoes; to authorise measures to prevent injurious cross-pollination; and for connected purposes.

items.title: Defence (Transfer of Functions) Act 1964
items.description: An Act to facilitate the making of new arrangements for the central organisation of defence, and to provide for matters consequential thereon.

items.title: Industrial Training Act 1964
items.description: An Act to make further provision for industrial and commercial training; to raise the limit on contributions out of the National Insurance Fund towards the expenses of the Minister of Labour in providing training courses; and for purposes connected with those matters.

items.title: Consolidated Fund (No. 2) Act 1964
Rating (Interim Relief) Act 1964
Married Women’s Property Act 1964
items.description: An Act to amend the law relating to rights of property as between husband and wife.

items.title: Air Corporations Act 1964
Uganda Act 1964
items.description: An Act to make provision as to the operation of the law in relation to Uganda as a Commonwealth Country not within Her Majesty's dominions.

items.title: Television Act 1964
British Nationality Act 1964
items.description: An Act to facilitate the resumption or renunciation of citizenship of the United Kingdom and Colonies.

items.title: Fireworks Act 1964 (repealed)
items.description: An Act to exempt fireworks consigned for export from the requirements of the Fireworks Act 1951 as to marking.

items.title: Trade Union (Amalgamations, etc.) Act 1964 (repealed 16.10.1992)
items.description: An Act to amend the law relating to the amalgamation of trade unions, the transfer of engagements from one trade union to another, and the alteration of the name of a trade union.

items.title: War Damage Act 1964
Licensing Act 1964 (repealed)
items.description: An Act to consolidate certain enactments relating to the sale and supply of intoxicating liquor in England and Wales and to matters connected therewith; with corrections and improvements made under the Consolidation of Enactments (Procedure) Act 1949.

items.title: Salmon and Freshwater Fisheries Act, 1923 (Amendment) Act 1964
Agriculture and Horticulture Act 1964
items.description: An Act to make provision for and in connection with the maintenance of minimum price levels for imports affecting the market for agricultural or horticultural produce of descriptions produced in the United Kingdom; to make further provision for assisting by the payment of grants the production and marketing of horticultural produce; to impose requirements as to the grading of horticultural produce when dealt in bulk and as to the mode of packing and transporting such produce; and for purposes connected with the matters aforesaid.

items.title: Continental Shelf Act 1964
items.description: An Act to make provision as to the exploration and exploitation of the continental shelf; to enable effect to be given to certain provisions of the Convention on the High Seas done in Geneva on 29th April 1958; and for matters connected with those purposes.

items.title: Post Office (Borrowing Powers) Act 1964
Legal Aid Act 1964
Elections (Welsh Forms) Act 1964
National Health Service (Hospital Boards) Act 1964
Burgh Police (Amendment) (Scotland) Act 1964
Criminal Procedure (Right Of Reply) Act 1964
items.description: An Act to amend the law relating to the prosecution's right of reply at trials on indictment.

items.title: Pharmacy and Poisons (Amendment) Act 1964
Dangerous Drugs Act 1964
Income Tax Management Act 1964
Emergency Powers Act 1964
items.description: An Act to amend the Emergency Powers Act 1920 and make permanent the Defence (Armed Forces) Regulations 1939.

items.title: Protection Of Animals (Anaesthetics) Act 1964
items.description: An Act to amend the Protection of Animals (Anaesthetics) Act 1954.

items.title: Trustee Savings Banks Act 1964
Harbours Act 1964
items.description: An Act to establish a National Ports Council; to provide for the control of harbour development and for giving financial assistance for the improvement of harbours; to make other provision respecting the construction, improvement, maintenance and management of harbours; to make provision with respect to charges of certain harbour authorities and lighthouse authorities; and for purposes connected with the matters aforesaid.

items.title: Succession (Scotland) Act 1964
items.description: An Act to assimilate and amend the law of Scotland with respect to the succession to the heritable and moveable property of deceased persons; to amend the law in relation to the legal and other prior rights exigible out of such property, to the administration of deceased persons’ estates and other property passing on death, to the capacity of minors to test, and to the presumption of survivorship; to provide for certain testamentary dispositions to be probative; to provide for adopted persons to be treated for certain purposes as children of their adopters; to make new provision as to the financial rights and obligations of the parties on the dissolution of a marriage; and for purposes connected with the matters aforesaid.

items.title: Administration of Justice Act 1964
items.description: An Act to make provision with respect to the administration of justice in the metropolitan area; to provide for a lieutenant and deputy lieutenants for Greater London; to make fresh provision with respect to the indemnification of justices and their clerks, recorders and clerks of the peace; to make minor amendments of the law relating to the administration of justice in England and Wales and an amendment of section 8 of the Justices of the Peace Act 1949 extending to Scotland; and for connected purposes.

items.title: Criminal Appeal Act 1964
Nurses Act 1964
Road Traffic Act 1964
Malawi Independence Act 1964
items.description: An Act to make provision for and in connection with the attainment by Nyasaland of fully responsible status within the Commonwealth.

items.title: Merchant Shipping Act 1964
items.description: An Act to enable effect to be given to an International Convention for the Safety of Life at Sea signed in London on 17th June 1960; to amend section 271 of the Merchant Shipping Act 1894; and for purposes connected therewith.

items.title: Police Act 1964
items.description: An Act to re-enact with modifications certain enactments relating to police forces in England and Wales, to amend the Police (Scotland) Act 1956, and to make further provision with respect to the police.

items.title: Finance Act 1964 (repealed)
items.description: An Act to grant certain duties, to alter other duties, and to amend the law relating to the National Debt and the Public Revenue, and to make further provision in connection with Finance.

items.title: International Headquarters and Defence Organisations Act 1964
items.description: An Act to make provision as to certain international headquarters and defence organisations.

items.title: Tenancy of Shops (Scotland) Act 1964
Universities and College Estates Act 1964
items.description: An Act to amend the law relating to property held by or on behalf of universities and colleges, and for purposes connected therewith.

items.title: Films Act 1964
Hire Purchase Act 1964
items.description: An Act to amend the law relating to hire-purchase and credit-sale, and, in relation thereto, to amend the enactments relating to the sale of goods; to make provision with respect to dispositions of motor vehicles which have been let or agreed to be sold by way of hire-purchase or conditional sale; to amend the Advertisements (Hire-Purchase) Act 1957; and for purposes connected with the matters aforesaid.

items.title: British Nationality (No. 2) Act 1964
items.description: An Act to provide for the acquisition of citizenship of the United Kingdom and Colonies by certain classes of persons who would otherwise be stateless; to restrict the grounds on which persons may be deprived of such citizenship where deprivation would render them stateless; to repeal section 20(4) and section 21 of the British Nationality Act 1948; and to extend the powers exercisable under that Act with respect to British protected persons.

items.title: Perpetuities and Accumulations Act 1964
items.description: An Act to modify the law of England and Wales relating to the avoidance of future interests in property on grounds of remoteness and governing accumulations of income from property.

items.title: Housing Act 1964
items.description: An Act to set up a new body to assist housing societies to provide housing accommodation, to confer powers and duties on local authorities to compel the carrying out of works for the improvement of dwellings which are without all or any of the standard amenities, to amend the law relating to the giving of financial assistance for the improvement of housing accommodation, to make further provision as to the powers and duties of local authorities as respects houses let in lodgings or occupied by more than one family, to amend the provisions of the Clean Air Act 1956 relating to the making of contributions to expenditure incurred in the adaptation of fireplaces in private dwellings, and to amend in other respects the law relating to housing.

items.title: Adoption Act 1964
Resale Prices Act 1964
Protection of Birds Act, 1954 (Amendment) Act 1964
Export Guarantees Act 1964
Emergency Laws (Re-enactments and Repeals) Act 1964
items.description: An Act to repeal the remaining Defence Regulations (that is to say those set out in the Emergency Laws (Repeal) Act 1959), except the Defence (Armed Forces) Regulations 1939, and to re-enact certain of those Defence Regulations with modifications; and to continue for limited periods the Ships and Aircraft (Transfer Restriction) Act 1939 and certain powers of the Board of Trade relating to jute products.

items.title: Animals (Restriction of Importation) Act 1964
items.description: An Act to restrict the importation of live animals of certain kinds.

items.title: Appropriation Act 1964
Law of Property (Joint Tenants) Act 1964
items.description: An Act to amend the law with respect to land vested in joint tenants.

items.title: Drugs (Prevention of Misuse) Act 1964
Zambia Independence Act 1964
items.description: An Act to make provision for, and in connection with, the establishment of Northern Rhodesia, under the name of Zambia, as an independent republic within the Commonwealth.

items.title: Young Persons (Employment) Act 1964
Local Government (Development and Finance) (Scotland) Act 1964
items.description: An Act to enable local authorities in Scotland to develop, and assist in the development of, land and to make provision for the disposal of litter and the advertising of amenities; to empower such authorities to set up certain capital funds and renewal and repair funds, to borrow by means of bonds and to allow discount for early payment of rates; and for purposes connected with the matters aforesaid.

items.title: New Towns (No. 2) Act 1964
Scrap Metal Dealers Act 1964 (repealed)
items.description: An Act to amend the law relating to dealers in scrap metal and similar goods, and to dealers in marine stores, and for purposes connected therewith

items.title: Shipbuilding Credit Act 1964
Riding Establishments Act 1964
items.description: An Act to regulate the keeping of riding establishments; and for purposes connected therewith.

items.title: Trading Stamps Act 1964 (repealed)
items.description: An Act to make provision with respect to trading stamps, including provision for regulating the issue, use and redemption of trading stamps; to provide for regulating the business of issuing and redeeming trading stamps; and for purposes connected with the matters aforesaid.

items.title: Fishery Limits Act 1964
items.description: An Act to extend the British fishery limits and amend the definition of " sea-fishing " in the Sea Fisheries Act 1883.

items.title: British North America Act 1964
items.description: An Act to amend the British North America Act 1867.

items.title: Obscene Publications Act 1964
items.description: An Act to strengthen the law for preventing the publication for gain of obscene matter and the publication of things intended for the production of obscene matter.

items.title: Public Libraries and Museums Act 1964
items.description: An Act to place the public library service provided by local authorities in England and Wales under the superintendence of the Secretary of State, to make new provision for regulating and improving that service and as to the provision and maintenance of museums and art galleries by such authorities, and for purposes connected with the matters aforesaid.

items.title: Malicious Damage Act 1964
Local Government (Pecuniary Interests) Act 1964
Betting, Gaming and Lotteries Act 1964
Statute Law Revision Act 1964
New Towns Act 1964
Statute Law Revision (Scotland) Act 1964
Diplomatic Privileges Act 1964
items.description: An Act to amend the law on diplomatic privileges and immunities by giving effect to the Vienna Convention on Diplomatic Relations; and for purposes connected therewith.

items.title: Education Act 1964 (repealed 1.11.1996)
items.description: An Act to enable county schools and voluntary schools to be established for providing full-time education by reference to age-limits differing from those specified in the Education Act 1944, as amended by the Education (Miscellaneous Provisions) Act 1948; to enable maintenance allowances to be granted in respect of pupils at special schools who would be over compulsory school age, or, in Scotland, over school age, but for section 38(1) of the said Act of 1944 or section 32(4) of the Education (Scotland) Act 1962; and for purposes connected with the matters aforesaid.

items.title: New Forest Act 1964
items.description: An Act to alter the perambulation of the New Forest, to make further provision for the New Forest, to amend the New Forest Acts 1877 to 1949 and for purposes connected with the matters aforesaid.

items.title: Criminal Procedure (Insanity) Act 1964
items.description: An Act to amend the form of the special verdict required by section 2 of the Trial of Lunatics Act 1883 and the procedure for determining whether an accused person is under a disability such as to constitute a bar to his being tried; to provide for an appeal against such a special verdict or a finding that the accused is under such a disability; to confer on the court of trial and the Court of Criminal Appeal further powers of making orders for admission to hospital; to empower the prosecution to put forward evidence of insanity or diminished responsibility; and for purposes connected with the matters aforesaid.

items.title: John F Kennedy Memorial Act 1964
Malta Independence Act 1964
items.description: An Act to make provision for, and in connection with, the attainment by Malta of fully responsible status within the Commonwealth.

items.title: Shipping Contracts and Commercial Documents Act 1964
Refreshment Houses Act 1964 (repealed)
items.description: An Act for the better regulation of refreshment houses within the meaning of the Refreshment Houses Act 1860.

items.title: Hairdressers (Registration) Act 1964
items.description: An Act to provide for the registration of hairdressers; and for purposes connected therewith.

items.title: Public Works Loans Act 1964
items.description: An Act to make further provision with respect to loans out of the Local Loans Fund, with respect to temporary borrowing by local authorities in Scotland and with respect to the re-borrowing powers of public authorities; to authorise an increase in the loans which may be made to the Government of Northern Ireland; and for connected purposes.

items.title: Spray Irrigation (Scotland) Act 1964 (repealed 1.10.1991)
items.description: An Act to enable river purification boards in Scotland in pursuance of their functions to control the abstraction of water for the purpose of spray irrigation; and for purposes connected therewith.

items.title: Divorce (Scotland) Act 1964
Finance (No. 2) Act 1964
Gambia Independence Act 1964
items.description: An Act to make provision for, and in connection with, the attainment by The Gambia of fully responsible status within the Commonwealth.

items.title: Expiring Laws Continuance Act 1964
Travel Concessions Act 1964
items.description: An Act to remove certain restrictions on the power of local authorities to make arrangements for the granting of travel concessions and to adjust the class of persons to whom such concessions may be granted on the raising of the school age.
